automate: Automate email workflows and increase communication efficiency.
streamli: Combine files and documents in one place for more effective work.
queryl: Request, list, and insert data into Google BigQuery.
accessg: Access Google Cloud Vertex AI models with Gemini using OAuth.
mountsi: Insert SIM tables into code sandbox via a separate CSV snippet with the key version number.
redactp: Remove PII from workflow logs by using customizable data retention rules (Presidio).
routetr: Route Trigger.dev starts in eu-central-1 instead of the default us-east-1. Global enable/disable
ssosess: SSO session does not contain email.
yourema: Your e-mail is not authorized to access this resource.
inputdo: Not matching the regular expression template
norelev: No context found in knowledge base.
oteltra: OTel identifier from the first incoming Go request. May differ from requestId when Sim assigns a canonical request ID.
whataut: What authentication or action with credentials is required?
onlycra: Download only the URLs that match these templates
howdeep: At what depth should we follow links (default is 2)
backward: Workspace files for backward compatibility. For new calls, it's recommended to use outputs.files[0].path.
iterate: Iterate through a collection or repeat a fixed number of times. The blocks inside the loop are executed once per iteration.
runbloc: Launch blocks in parallel branches. All branches are executed simultaneously.
renders: Render supports only files with .pptx, .docx and .pdf formats
arespon: Answer is being processed for this chat.
sseread: SSE reading cycle completed without an ending event (the caller was expecting it).
received: Invalid JSON received while parsing event data.
replayh: Replay history is unavailable. Some events may be lost.
calleru: Calling user does not match the internal marker theme
youdon: You do not have access to this workspace.
thispro: This provider can only be connected under the name of a registered account and cannot be used for login.
registra: Registration is disabled, please contact an administrator.
emailpa: Email/password authentication is disabled. Please use SSO for login.
emailsi: Email registration is disabled. Use Google, Microsoft or GitHub.
signups: Registration from this email domain is prohibited.
adescri: A description that takes up some space.
parsedc: Contents of the parsed CSV files
parsedt: Text extracted from the TXT file
parsedm: Parsed contents of the MD file
howtor: How to conduct research thoroughly and come back with something truly useful.
howtot: How to take a finalized working process and use it in the external world.
filemus: The file must contain a key, path or URL.
announce: Press Release, Analytics and AI Assistant Creation Guidance.
basedon: On basis of my research using several sources...
afolder: Folder with this name already exists in this position.
userdoe: User does not have permissions for the target workspace.
usageli: Usage limit exceeded. Please upgrade your plan to continue.
brokerr: Broker result cannot be serialized to JSON
errorch: Limit check on request count error
eitheru: Access requires either userId or email
limitmu: The limit must be a number.
offsetm: The offset must be a number.
agentca: Agent capabilities should be an object.
agentau: Agent authentication should be an object.
agentsk: Agent level should be an object.
minchun: The fragment size (in characters) must be smaller than the maximum token size times four.
eithers: Either selectAll should be true or documentIds should be provided.
eachwor: Each workspace (and the default value for all workspaces) can have at most one data privacy rule.
largeva: A key with a high value refers to a server storage in the execution area.
rolemus: Role must be user, assistant, or system.
jsonkey: The JSON key must be of type
urlmust: URL should use http or https
mustbe: Should be a valid IANA time zone (e.g., America/New_York)
emaillo: Successful email logging (no configured email service)
thissub: This subscription is managed at the organization level. Change the usage limit for the organization instead.
freepla: Users on the free plan cannot edit usage limits.
usagelog: Use the Usage Log to track user actions in the system.
amountm: The amount must be between $10 and $1000.
onlypro: Only Pro and Team users can buy credits.
onlyorg: Only organization owners and administrators can purchase credits
nopayme: No payment method specified. Please update your payment information.
exactna: What is the user skill name for upload?
aservic: Account credentials with this name already exist in the workspace.
youneed: You need administrator rights to invite users.
